title: fetch_tablet_photo data payload
description: v0.78.0 — Fetch + cache a full-res eBL tablet photo (JPEG) to local disk. Resolves the FETCHABLE eBL REST endpoint (.../api/fragments/{id}/photo) and caches under getCacheDir()/photos/<id>.jpg. cache_path is null (with a warning) when eBL has no photo on file or is unreachable — the tool degrades gracefully and never errors. Returns the local path + size + content-type only; the photo is British-Museum-collection material fetched to the caller's cache for analysis, NOT redistributed. Wrapped in StructuredEnvelope.

ebl_photo_api_url.description: The fetchable eBL REST photo endpoint resolved for this tablet.

cache_path.description: Absolute path to the cached JPEG on local disk, or null if no photo could be fetched (see warnings).

bytes.description: Size of the cached JPEG in bytes, or null if not fetched.

content_type.description: HTTP content-type of the fetched image (normally image/jpeg), or null.

cached.description: True if an existing cached file was reused; false if freshly downloaded (or not fetched).
